For additional materials in other languages, please visit the following pages: 
CDC Print Resources 
Health Education and Communication Tools For RIM Communities and Other Limited-English-Proficient Populations 
Mpox Digital Resources 
Information in other languages may also be available on other cdc.gov Web pages by specific topic or disease.
